title: viola retusa
intro: Viola retusa, also known as the yellow viola or small yellow pansy, is a small, perennial plant that belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Viola retusa include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and improving sleep quality. Viola retusa can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
